privileged_info_summary: The task targets a simulated video management system environment using Nx Witness (NetworkOptix). The camera to be recovered is named 'Server Room Camera'. Network inventory credentials are username 'admin' and password 'password'. The camera must be configured to record at 15 FPS (frames per second). The network inventory file containing IP address and credentials is located at /home/ga/Documents/network_inventory.txt. All data is synthetic, generated by the task setup scripts, not from real production systems.
